task_info.user_task: 打开bilibili，给我发一条动态，内容为test，标题为test
task_info.name: bilibili发送动态
task_info.user_playbook: 打开bilibili后，点击下方加号，进入后点击发图文，开始编辑动态，最后发布

segments.sub_task_description: 打开bilibili，给我发一条动态，内容为test，标题为test

steps.expected: A menu should appear with options for different types of posts, including "发图文" (Post picture/text).

semantic_descriptor.instruction: Tap the plus button at the bottom center.
semantic_descriptor.page_context: The home page of Bilibili is visible with a creation button at the bottom.
semantic_descriptor.expected_after_tap: A menu should appear with options for different types of posts, including "发图文" (Post picture/text).
semantic_descriptor.source_observation: The home page of Bilibili is visible with a creation button at the bottom.

steps.expected: The dynamic post creation/editing screen should open.

semantic_descriptor.instruction: Tap "发图文" to start creating a picture/text post.
semantic_descriptor.page_context: The posting menu is open, and "发图文" (Post picture/text) is visible at the bottom right.
semantic_descriptor.expected_after_tap: The dynamic post creation/editing screen should open.
semantic_descriptor.source_observation: The posting menu is open, and "发图文" (Post picture/text) is visible at the bottom right.

steps.expected: The title input field should be focused, and the keyboard might appear.

locator.text: 好的标题更容易获得支持，选填20字

semantic_descriptor.instruction: Tap the title input field to focus it.
semantic_descriptor.page_context: The dynamic post editor is open with title and content input fields visible.
semantic_descriptor.expected_after_tap: The title input field should be focused, and the keyboard might appear.
semantic_descriptor.source_observation: The dynamic post editor is open with title and content input fields visible.

steps.expected: The title field should now contain the text "test".
The content input field should be focused, and the cursor should appear there.

locator.text: 分享我的哔哩哔哩动态

semantic_descriptor.instruction: Tap the content input field to focus it.
semantic_descriptor.page_context: The title "test" has been successfully entered, and the editor is ready for content input.
semantic_descriptor.expected_after_tap: The content input field should be focused, and the cursor should appear there.
semantic_descriptor.source_observation: The title "test" has been successfully entered, and the editor is ready for content input.

steps.expected: The content field should now contain the text "test".
The post should be submitted, and the screen should transition back to the main app or a success page.

semantic_descriptor.instruction: Tap the "发布" (Publish) button at the top right to finish posting.
semantic_descriptor.page_context: The dynamic post editor is filled with "test" for both title and content, and the "发布" button is visible.
semantic_descriptor.expected_after_tap: The post should be submitted, and the screen should transition back to the main app or a success page.
semantic_descriptor.source_observation: The dynamic post editor is filled with "test" for both title and content, and the "发布" button is visible.
